variants.title: Donaldson P552464 Lube Spin-On
variants.description: Genuine Donaldson P552464 Lube Spin-On is engineered to deliver reliable performance and durability across a wide range of applications. Designed with high-quality materials, it ensures consistent functionality while meeting demanding operational requirements. Whether used in industrial, automotive, or heavy-duty settings, this component offers dependable operation and longevity. Its versatile design makes it suitable for various uses, supporting system efficiency and overall performance.
specifications: Style: Lube Spin-On, Outer Diameter: 96.3 mm, Length: 206.5 mm
